title: Timeout Trees
description: Timeout Trees use a pre-signed transaction tree to virtualize many ownership outputs under a shared settlement structure, while preserving unilateral redemption after a timeout.

resources.title: Cube implementation repository
resources.notes: Primary implementation reference for the Cube execution environment; the article that motivated this node is tracked in the source audit.

resources.notes: Independent technical context for transaction-tree timeout constructions.
